mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( userId, statusCode, amount, payType, receiveName, addr1, addr2, updatedAt ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{statusCode}, ( SELECT SUM(p.price *c.quantity*(1 - (IFNULL(d.discountRate, 0)*0.01))) as amount FROM userCart c JOIN user u ON c.userSeq = u.userSeq JOIN product p ON c.productSeq = p.productSeq LEFT JOIN discount d ON p.discountSeq = d.discountSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId} ), #{payType}, #{receiveName}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO orderDetail ( orderSeq, productSeq, productSizeSeq, materialSeq, orderMemo, count, unitPrice, price, updatedAt ) VALUES
( #{item.orderSeq}, #{item.productSeq}, #{item.productSizeSeq}, #{item.materialSeq}, #{item.orderMemo}, #{item.count}, #{item.unitPrice}, #{item.price}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT c.quantity AS count, c.productSeq, c.productSizeSeq, c.materialSeq, c.orderMemo, p.price*(1 - IFNULL(d.discountRate, 0)*0.01) AS unitPrice, p.price*c.quantity*(1 - (IFNULL(d.discountRate, 0)*0.01)) AS price FROM userCart c JOIN user u ON c.userSeq = u.userSeq JOIN product p ON c.productSeq = p.productSeq LEFT JOIN discount d ON p.discountSeq = d.discountSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId}
SELECT s.productSeq , s.quantity AS count FROM stock s WHERE s.productSeq IN ( SELECT uc.productSeq FROM userCart uc JOIN user u ON uc.userSeq = u.userSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId} ) FOR UPDATE
SELECT uc.productSeq , uc.quantity AS count, p.productName FROM userCart uc JOIN user u ON uc.userSeq = u.userSeq JOIN product p ON uc.productSeq = p.productSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stockHistory(productSeq, oldStockQuantity, newStockQuantity, modifyQuantity, modifyHistory ) SELECT s.productSeq , s.quantity , s.quantity - ucSum.quantity AS modifyQuantity, CONCAT('-', ucSum.quantity) AS modifyHistory, '판매' FROM stock s JOIN ( SELECT uc.productSeq, SUM(uc.quantity) AS quantity FROM userCart uc JOIN user u ON uc.userSeq = u.userSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId} GROUP BY productSeq ) ucSum ON s.productSeq = ucSum.productSeq
mapper.update: UPDATE stock s JOIN ( SELECT uc.productSeq, SUM(uc.quantity) AS quantity FROM userCart uc JOIN user u ON uc.userSeq = u.userSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId} GROUP BY productSeq ) ucSum ON s.productSeq = ucSum.productSeq SET s.quantity = s.quantity - ucSum.quantity
mapper.delete: DELETE uc FROM userCart uc JOIN user u ON uc.userSeq = u.userSeq WHERE u.userId = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT o.userId , o.orderSeq , o.receiveName , o.addr1 , o.addr2 , o.amount FROM `order` o WHERE o.userId = #{userId} AND o.orderSeq = #{orderSeq};

SELECT od.productSeq , p.productName , ps.sizeName , m.materialName , od.orderMemo , od.count , p.imageURL FROM orderDetail od JOIN product p ON od.productSeq = p.productSeq LEFT JOIN productSize ps ON od.productSizeSeq = ps.productSizeSeq JOIN material m ON od.materialSeq = m.materialSeq WHERE od.orderSeq = #{orderSeq};
